summary: Expanded test_secrets_scanner.py from 70 tests to 154 tests (all passing). Added 14 new test classes covering enum values, SecretFinding.to_dict() serialization, SecretsScanResult with findings and edge cases, _map_secret_type edge cases (priority ordering, empty input, case normalization), extended gitleaks/trufflehog parsing (missing fields, null values, whitespace-only input, metadata fields), config from_env defaults, availability caching, exit code 1 (gitleaks) and 183 (trufflehog) success paths, scan_history=False behavior, and dataclass defaults.
